summary: Rows4/5/6 c3 context diagnostics do not fix native grouping>=3. Forcing full-attention context through compact-cache copies and through a temporary output buffer both keep the retained 512/128 generated-token prefixes at [45,11,137], matching native full. Paired L40 decode-step-0 traces also keep the first full-attention stage failure at layer 7 attn_input_pre_qkv with max_abs 0.015625. Therefore context-cache copying and context output-buffer aliasing are eliminated as the current c3 fix; the remaining target stays upstream of context at hidden/pre-QKV grouped full-attention setup.

blockers: full-attention context forced through compact-cache batch diagnostic path
full-attention context forced through temp-output batch diagnostic path

retained_claim_blockers: native c3 full-attention grouping remains generated-token red under both context diagnostics
both diagnostics force non-retained context paths and native_caware_decode=false
no retained c>N throughput/scaling claim is made
